reviews.review_description: Misses the mark somewhat, but maybe my tracking wasn't working at it's best.

developer_response.body: hey thanks for trying - and charming is great! I was wondering - regarding missing the mark, do you mean in terms of the grab, or other expected interactions? I'm trying to get as natural a pick up as possible, so wondering what your experience was and maybe I can make it feel a bit better :) Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: I loved this game it’s the best hand tracking game on be ever

reviews.review_title: good but made me a bit to sad
reviews.review_description: its great just i hate the story line because im to sad and the teliporting is bad

developer_response.body: hey tallduck i'm sad too! sometimes making art about it helps - I'll try and work on the teleporting :)
